name: supabase
description: Query and manage your Supabase database with full CRUD operations

envVars.name: SUPABASE_ACCESS_TOKEN
envVars.description: Supabase personal access token for the Management API (starts with sbp_)

envVars.name: SUPABASE_ANON_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase anonymous/public API key for client-side operations

envVars.name: SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY
envVars.description: Supabase service role key for server-side operations (bypasses RLS)

tools.name: List Tables
tools.description: List all tables in your Supabase database

tools.name: Query Table
tools.description: Select rows from a table with optional filters and sorting

tools.name: Insert Row
tools.description: Insert a new row into a table

tools.name: Update Row
tools.description: Update an existing row in a table

tools.name: Delete Row
tools.description: Delete a row from a table

tools.name: List Organizations
tools.description: List the organizations your access token can manage

tools.name: List Projects
tools.description: List all Supabase projects across your organizations

tools.name: Get Project
tools.description: Get details and status of a Supabase project

ref.description: Project reference ID (the xxxxx in https://xxxxx.supabase.co)

tools.name: Run SQL
tools.description: Run a SQL query against a project's Postgres database via the Management API

ref.description: Project reference ID (the xxxxx in https://xxxxx.supabase.co)

query.description: SQL statement to execute, e.g. select * from public.users limit 10

prompts.title: Query my database
prompts.prompt: Help me query data from my Supabase database. Show me specific records or analyze patterns.

prompts.title: Create a record
prompts.prompt: Create a new record in my Supabase database with the information I provide.

prompts.title: Update records
prompts.prompt: Find and update records in my Supabase database based on specific criteria.

prompts.title: Database statistics
prompts.prompt: Show me statistics and insights about my Supabase database tables and data.
